published_prior_art.cite: DukesShpitserTchetgen2023: proximal mediation point-identifies natural direct and indirect effects under bridge/completeness conditions, Biometrika 110(4), 973-987, doi:10.1093/biomet/asad015
ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023: nonunique proximal bridge solution sets for counterfactual means; GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023: proxy partial-ID without completeness

GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023: proxy bounds without completeness; CaiKurokiPearlTian2008/LuoGeng2016/MilesKankiMeloniTchetgen2017: no-proxy finite mediation/direct-effect bound ancestors; GabrielSachsSjolander2023: joint decomposition bounds need not rectangularize

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The rank-one bridge-null reduction collapses algebraically: since omega_{a,m,x}=P(W|A=a,M=m,X=x) is a mixture of the rows of K_{a,m,x}, every null vector nu with K nu=0 satisfies eta=omega^T nu=0, so all lambda_j vanish and the advertised nondegenerate zonotope/missing-corner geometry cannot occur under the stated definitions.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The strict-tightening statement is framed as a coordinate projection from Conjecture 1, but Conjecture 1's bridge-null coordinate projections are singleton under the stated K and omega definitions; any surviving proxy tightening would have to be a direct finite response-type LP result, not the proposed rank-one bridge-null bound.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add an explicit row-span/null-space sanity lemma for K and omega before any redraft; if the lemma is accepted, withdraw the rank-one bridge-null zonotope as the flagship kernel.

Pivot Conjecture 2 into a standalone proxy-response polytope theorem: define C_{E,s} as the exact proxy projection of the no-proxy endpoint face and prove the Farkas separator without relying on bridge-null loadings.

If a field-tier kernel is still desired, change the setup so the target functional weights are not in the row span of the bridge operator, or move to a genuinely different weak-proxy failure mode where null-space variation can affect PNDE/TNIE.

recommended_next_step: Pivot rather than revise locally: the stated binary rank-one bridge-null mechanism annihilates its own loading vectors, leaving only generic finite-LP separation below the field novelty floor.
